creator: miwi@FreeBSD.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

On Mon, 11 Dec 2006 16:10:21 GMT
Vivek Khera <vivek@khera.org> wrote:

>  
>  Firstly, how did slony1 port get to version 1.2.1 without my
> approval or notification?
>  

Sorry, it was definietly my fault. I thought its a maintainer-timeout
case. It was my mistake and I hope you forgive me for this mistake.


>  I suppose you should go ahead and apply this patch to clean up the  
>  plist.  It looks like "miwi" did the commit against ports system  
>  policy of getting approval of the maintainer.
>  

Yes the policy said we wait 14 days of Maintainer approval. :(( Big
sorry for this. 

The Contributor contacted me with email, and I just forgot to double
check this PR with maintainer.


- - Martin
